hero.art_prompt: Rohan, an 18 year old Indian student, happily surprised at a laptop showing an affordable BCA fee after comparing colleges, bright hopeful mood, tidy home.

panels.narration: Rohan compared BCA fees, college after college.
panels.dialogue: Why is tech study so costly?
panels.img_prompt: Rohan, 18, at a desk comparing several high college-fee figures in a notebook, concerned, papers around him, modest home.

panels.narration: Most good options ran into several lakhs.
panels.dialogue: Is a real degree only for the rich?
panels.img_prompt: Rohan looking discouraged at a laptop showing an expensive fee, chin in hand, soft disappointed expression, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a recognised BCA at ₹49,000 a year.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan's eyes widening with hope at a laptop showing a clear, affordable, recognised BCA fee, warm glow of relief.

panels.narration: He enrolled on a 0% EMI he could manage.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan smiling proudly holding a blank enrollment confirmation at home, calm and confident, warm hopeful light. No cash or money shown.

turn.title: Why This BCA Fee Is A Steal
points: Just ₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year). A recognised tech degree at a fair, honest price.
Pay the full year upfront and get a discount, or split it into easy 0% interest EMI.
0% interest EMI from about ₹4,083/month, no extra cost.
Only ₹2,500 one-time registration. Clear fees, no hidden charges.

testimonials.name: Rohan Pillai
testimonials.quote: I compared everywhere. A UGC-entitled BCA at ₹49,000 a year was the clear, honest choice.

testimonials.name: Arjun Das
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI meant no lump sum. I pay a small amount each month and my degree keeps going.

testimonials.name: Nisha Verma
testimonials.quote: We paid the year upfront and got a clear discount. A recognised degree at this price felt unreal.

testimonials.name: Vikram Rao
testimonials.quote: I finished my BCA without a single education loan. The monthly plan fit my budget perfectly.

facts.v: 0% interest EMI from about ₹4,083/month, or an education loan
